identity.name: Cloud App — Benign OAuth Baseline (control / FP-suppression validation)
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-005. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1078.004. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-005. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1078.004. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CLOUD-005.
UC: OAuth Baseline / False-Positive Validation / TC: openid+email+profile Grant Should NOT Trigger Risky-Scope Alerts.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CLOUD-005 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Benign OIDC grant to Okta — must NOT alert
cat > /tmp/cloud-005-okta.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-005
name: "Cloud App — benign baseline Okta"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - cortexsim-canary.okta.com
dry_run: false
tags: [cloud-app, baseline, fp-validation]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: okta
      scope_preset: benign
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-005-okta.yml --live
# step-2: Benign OIDC grant to Microsoft — must NOT alert
cat > /tmp/cloud-005-ms.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-005
name: "Cloud App — benign baseline Microsoft"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - login.microsoftonline.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: microsoft
      scope_preset: benign
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-005-ms.yml --live
# step-3: Benign OIDC grant to Google — must NOT alert
cat > /tmp/cloud-005-google.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-005
name: "Cloud App — benign baseline Google"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - accounts.google.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: google
      scope_preset: benign
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-005-google.yml --live
